flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at High Plains Technology Center fell 82% between 2021 and 2024 (58.8% → 10.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at High Plains Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (50.0% vs 55.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at High Plains Technology Center rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 (68 → 95).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at High Plains Technology Center rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (68.5% → 76.9%).
